name: Velvet Corn Soup with Crab Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the crab meat in the ginger, sherry, and cornstarch.
2. Heat the chicken stock. Add the corn and bring to a boil.
3. Add the crabmeat mixture and again bring to a boil.
4. Turn down the heat and gently stir in the egg yolks. Fold in the egg whites.
Garnish with chopped parsley.
